name: IPreferences
summary: An interface which defines preference settings.

methods.name: GetIsBackgroundPreviewActive(string)
methods.summary: Returns active state of specified background preview

methods.name: Save(string)
methods.summary: Call this method to serialize PreferenceSettings given the output file path.

params.name: filePath
params.doc: The full path of the output file to serialize PreferenceSettings to.

returns.doc: Returns true if the serialization is successful, or false otherwise.

methods.name: SetIsBackgroundPreviewActive(string, bool)
methods.summary: Sets active state of specified background preview

properties.name: BackgroundPreviews
properties.summary: Collection of pairs [BackgroundPreviewName;isActive]

properties.name: BackupFiles
properties.summary: Returns list of backup files

properties.name: CollapseToMinSize
properties.summary: Indicates if the groups should be collapsed by default.

properties.name: ConnectorType
properties.summary: Indicates which type of connector's should be displayed on canvas. I.e. bezier or polyline

properties.name: ConsoleHeight
properties.summary: Returns height of console

properties.name: CustomPackageFolders
properties.summary: Returns list of folders containing zero-touch nodes and custom nodes.

properties.name: GraphChecksumItemsList
properties.summary: IPreferences.GraphChecksumItemsList

properties.name: GridScaleFactor
properties.summary: Sets the scale of the background grid element. Default is 1.0.

properties.name: IsADPAnalyticsReportingApproved
properties.summary: Indicates whether ADP analytics reporting is approved or not.

properties.name: IsBackgroundGridVisible
properties.summary: Indicates whether background grid is visible or not.

properties.name: IsFirstRun
properties.summary: Indicates first run

properties.name: MaxNumRecentFiles
properties.summary: Returns maximal count of recent files which can be displayed

properties.name: NumberFormat
properties.summary: Returns the decimal precision used to display numbers.

properties.name: OptionalInPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates if the optional input ports are hidden by default.

properties.name: PackageDirectoriesToUninstall
properties.summary: Returns list of packages used by the Package Manager to determine which packages are scheduled to be deleted or scheduled to be unloaded.

properties.name: PythonTemplateFilePath
properties.summary: Return full path to the Python (.py) file to use as a starting template when creating a new PythonScript Node.

properties.name: RecentFiles
properties.summary: Returns list of recent files

properties.name: ShowConnector
properties.summary: Indicates whether connector should be displayed on canvas or not.

properties.name: ShowDefaultGroupDescription
properties.summary: Indicates if groups should display the default description.

properties.name: ShowEdges
properties.summary: Indicates whether surface and solid edges will be rendered.

properties.name: ShowPreviewBubbles
properties.summary: Indicates if preview bubbles should be displayed on nodes.

properties.name: TemplateFilePath
properties.summary: Return full path of the template directory with template file(s) to use as a starting template when creating a new graph from a template.

properties.name: UnconnectedOutPortsCollapsed
properties.summary: Indicates if the unconnected output ports are hidden by default.

properties.name: WindowH
properties.summary: Returns the last height of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowW
properties.summary: Returns the last width of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowX
properties.summary: Returns the last X coordinate of the Dynamo window.

properties.name: WindowY
properties.summary: Returns the last Y coordinate of the Dynamo window.
